title.en: China-to-Romania PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入罗马尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入羅馬尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China PV inverter documentation against Romania (ASRO/ANRE/Transelectrica) requirements for EU CE framework compliance (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, and where applicable RED 2014/53/EU), grid interconnection, EMC, and destination-country due-diligence expectations, with Constanta as the main port.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国光伏逆变器文件与罗马尼亚（ASRO/ANRE/Transelectrica）基于欧盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU及必要时RED 2014/53/EU）、并网、电磁兼容和尽责管理要求的差距对照，康斯坦察为主要入境港。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國光伏逆變器文件與羅馬尼亞（ASRO/ANRE/Transelectrica）基於歐盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU及必要時RED 2014/53/EU）、併網、電磁相容和盡責管理要求的差距對照，康斯坦察為主要入境港。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Romania (ASRO/ANRE/Transelectrica) requirements, EU CE directives, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、并网审批或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行罗马尼亚（ASRO/ANRE/Transelectrica）及欧盟相关法规的要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、併網核准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行羅馬尼亞（ASRO/ANRE/Transelectrica）及歐盟相關法規的要求。

answer_first.en: For Romania, PV inverter market entry requires EU CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU and EMC Directive 2014/30/EU (plus RED 2014/53/EU if wireless interfaces are present), compliance with ANRE/Transelectrica grid-interconnection requirements (EN 50549-1/-2, EU RfG 2016/631), and ASRO standard adoption alignment. The Romanian grid operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz; China's nominal 220/380 V differs and re-parameterisation is required. Romanian-language documentation is expected by installers and ANRE. Constanta is the principal import gateway.
answer_first.zh: 对于罗马尼亚，光伏逆变器进入市场须取得LVD 2014/35/EU和EMC指令2014/30/EU（如含无线接口则需加RED 2014/53/EU）下的欧盟CE标志，符合ANRE/Transelectrica并网要求（EN 50549-1/-2、欧盟RfG 2016/631），并与ASRO采标标准接轨。罗马尼亚电网运行电压为230/400 V、50 Hz，与中国名义220/380 V有所不同，须重新参数化。安装商和ANRE通常要求提供罗马尼亚语文件。康斯坦察是主要入境口岸。
answer_first.zht: 對於羅馬尼亞，光伏逆變器進入市場須取得LVD 2014/35/EU和EMC指令2014/30/EU（如含無線接口則需加RED 2014/53/EU）下的歐盟CE標誌，符合ANRE/Transelectrica並網要求（EN 50549-1/-2、歐盟RfG 2016/631），並與ASRO採標標準接軌。羅馬尼亞電網運行電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz，與中國名義220/380 V有所不同，須重新參數化。安裝商和ANRE通常要求提供羅馬尼亞語文件。康斯坦察是主要入境口岸。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
